The preparations for the gathering started early this year and people are already arguing about arrangements
Last time we had a proper celebration the whole settlement turned out and the singing went until dawn
The bonfire pit needs rebuilding before the next gathering and no one has volunteered to haul the stone
Someone suggested a competition of skill this year and the crafters and the guards both want to run it their way
The brewer has been setting aside a special batch for months and will not let anyone sample it early
The decorations from last year's gathering were stored badly and most of them are ruined beyond saving
Children have been rehearsing songs for the celebration and practicing at all hours of the day and night
The cooks are arguing over who gets to use the communal ovens first on the day of the feast
A troupe of traveling performers sent word that they would pass through in time for the gathering
The elders want the celebration to follow tradition but the younger folk are pushing for something new
The last gathering drew visitors from settlements that had never sent anyone before
There is talk of reviving the old lantern walk where everyone carries a light from the hall to the gate and back
